channels.title: チャンネル
channels.empty: 開いているチャンネルはありません

peers.title: ピア
peers.empty: 接続中のピアはありません

orderHistory.title: Order History
orderHistory.noOrdersDesc: You haven't ordered any channels yet.

increaseCapacity.title: Open Channel with On-Chain
increaseCapacity.description: Funds used to open a channel minus fees will be added to your spending balance
increaseCapacity.info: Open a channel with on-chain funds. Both parties are free to close the channel at any time. However, by keeping more funds on your side of the channel and using it regularly, there is more chance the channel will stay open.
increaseCapacity.increaseSpendingTooltip: Configure the amount of spending capacity you need. You will need to deposit on-chain flokicoin to cover the entire channel size, plus on-chain fees.
increaseCapacity.lookingToReceive: Looking to receive funds instead? You might need incoming capacity.
increaseCapacity.confirmDesc: Are you sure you want to open a Lightning channel with the following details?
increaseCapacity.confirmWarning: Opening a channel requires an on-chain transaction and network fees. This action cannot be undone. Please verify all details before proceeding.

orderChannel.title: Increase Inbound Liquidity
orderChannel.description: Order a channel from your LSP to increase your receiving capacity
orderChannel.info: Order a channel from an LSP. This provides inbound liquidity, allowing you to receive payments immediately after the channel is confirmed.
orderChannel.reviewDesc: Complete Payment to open a channel to your node
orderChannel.consentMsg: By proceeding, you consent the channel opens immediately and that you lose the right to revoke once it is open.
orderChannel.openedDesc: Your channel is now open and ready to use.
